name: agentic-analyzer
description: Authoring kit for LLM-judged, schema-validated, replayable code analyzers. Scaffolds a domain-specific Claude Code skill via an interactive `/new-analyzer` interview that drafts rules.md through a dispatched rule-author subagent, then stamps the skill from cross-platform templates. Ships four specialist subagents and a generic runtime (validator, snippet normalizer, fixture comparator, override-replay engine).
